name: codex-session-timeline
description: Visualize Codex session timing, tool waits, subagents, and queue activity.

interface.shortDescription: Visualize Codex sessions and queue timing.
interface.longDescription: Codex Session Timeline runs a local dashboard for inspecting Codex session JSONL files, explicit waits, tool calls, subagent activity, app-server workers, spawned agent jobs, and queue lifetimes. It supports local sessions, configured SSH remotes, drag-to-zoom timelines, minimap brushing, queue workload zooming, and clickable event/tool/queue details.
defaultPrompt: Show timing for this session id.
